name: xiuer-live-assistant
description: 秀儿直播助手 - 专业直播助手工具
author: Live Studio Team

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && node scripts/copy-runtime-files.js && node scripts/generate-build-config.js
scripts.quality:check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test -- --run
scripts.audit:pip: python3 -m pip install --disable-pip-version-check --quiet --user pip-audit && cd auth-api && python3 -m pip_audit -r requirements.txt
scripts.audit:deps: npm run audit:npm && npm run audit:pip
scripts.auth:venv: python3 -m venv auth-api/.venv && auth-api/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -r auth-api/requirements.txt
scripts.auth:syntax: cd auth-api && .venv/bin/python -m py_compile main.py config.py deps.py models.py schemas.py sms_service.py auth_feature_rules.py subscription_rules.py && find routers -name '*.py' -exec .venv/bin/python -m py_compile {} \;
scripts.auth:smoke: cd auth-api && JWT_SECRET=test-secret-for-ci-32-bytes-minimum-key DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///tmp/test.db .venv/bin/python -c "from main import app; print('FastAPI app imported successfully')"
scripts.auth:test: cd auth-api && .venv/bin/python -m unittest test_auth_feature_rules.py && .venv/bin/python -m unittest test_subscription_rules.py && .venv/bin/python -m unittest test_subscription_system.py && .venv/bin/python -m unittest test_single_session_enforcement.py && .venv/bin/python -m unittest test_auth_contracts.py && .venv/bin/python -m unittest test_subscription_contracts.py
scripts.auth:check: npm run auth:syntax && npm run auth:smoke && npm run auth:test
scripts.ci:auth: npm run auth:venv && npm run auth:check
scripts.dist:win: node scripts/validate-build-env.js && npm run dist:validate && npm run dist:clean && npm run build && npm run dist:check && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: node scripts/validate-build-env.js && npm run dist:clean && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run dist:clean && npm run build && electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.release:mac: node scripts/validate-build-env.js && npm run release:guard && npm run dist:clean && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.release:win: node scripts/validate-build-env.js && npm run release:guard && npm run dist:clean && npm run build && electron-builder --win
